title: schizachyrium scoparium subsp. neomexicanum
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium subsp. neomexicanum, commonly known as New Mexico bluestem, is a subspecies of grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schizachyrium scoparium subsp. neomexicanum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in folk remedies for various ailments.
